<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\TestSize; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @immutable */ final readonly class Medium extends Known { public function isMedium(): true { return true; } public function isGreaterThan(TestSize $other): bool { return $other->isSmall(); } public function asString(): string { return 'medium'; } }
